introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body:
# Welcome

This is a starting scaffold for a documentation site. Replace this page and the other entries in `data/pages.json` with your own content. Nav structure lives in `data/nav.json`.

## Features

- Sidebar navigation (sections + pages)
- Client-side search over page bodies
- Dark/light theme toggle
- Code blocks with inline `monospace`

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.body:
# Quickstart

Edit `data/pages.json` to add your content. Each key becomes a route slug.

```ts
import { pages } from './src/data/docs'
console.log(pages.introduction.title)
```

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.body:
# Deployment

Build: `npm run build`. Output lands in `dist/`.
